message:
fix(connector): replace non-empty-token auth with transcript-bound HMAC-SHA256 verification

Replace the `!token.is_empty()` authentication shortcut in control_channel.rs
with proper transcript-bound capability verification using HMAC-SHA256:

- Introduce ChannelCredential with epoch-scoped HMAC key derivation (HKDF-SHA256)
- Add TranscriptFields struct for length-prefixed transcript binding
- Implement sign_channel_message() and verify_credential() with ct_eq_bytes
- Add nonce tracking (BTreeSet with MAX_SEEN_NONCES=8192) for replay protection
- Add 8 adversarial security tests (payload swap, cross-channel replay, nonce
  reuse, stale epoch, wrong direction, wrong secret, guessed token, sequence tamper)
- All 31 tests pass including regression test for the original vulnerability

Closes: bd-3cvu

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
